name: infamous-freight
description: Infamous Freight — The freight dispatch platform built by truckers, for truckers

scripts.dev:api: node -e "console.log('Skipping API dev: apps/api not found.')"
scripts.build:api: node -e "console.log('Skipping API build: apps/api not found.')"
scripts.prisma:generate: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma')) { require('child_process').execSync('npm --prefix apps/api exec prisma generate', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } else { console.log('Skipping Prisma generate: apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma not found.'); }"
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:seed: cd apps/api && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.lint:web: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const {execSync}=require('child_process');const configs=['apps/web/eslint.config.js','apps/web/eslint.config.mjs','apps/web/eslint.config.cjs','apps/web/.eslintrc','apps/web/.eslintrc.js','apps/web/.eslintrc.cjs','apps/web/.eslintrc.json'];if(configs.some((f)=>fs.existsSync(f))){execSync('node scripts/run-web-task.js lint',{stdio:'inherit'});}else{console.log('Skipping lint:web (no ESLint config found in apps/web).');}"
scripts.test:web: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const {execSync}=require('child_process');const candidates=['apps/web/jest.config.js','apps/web/jest.config.ts','apps/web/jest.config.cjs','apps/web/package.json'];const hasJestConfig=candidates.slice(0,3).some((f)=>fs.existsSync(f));let hasJestDep=false;if(fs.existsSync('apps/web/package.json')){const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('apps/web/package.json','utf8'));const merged={...(p.dependencies||{}),...(p.devDependencies||{})};hasJestDep=Object.keys(merged).some((k)=>k==='jest'||k.startsWith('@jest/')||k==='ts-jest');}if(hasJestConfig||hasJestDep){execSync('node scripts/run-web-task.js test --runInBand',{stdio:'inherit'});}else{console.log('Skipping test:web (no Jest config/dependency found in apps/web).');}"
